page: OVHcloud d2-8 is a Discovery family virtual server instance configured on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture powered by an Intel Core Processor (Haswell, no TSX) running at 2.0 GHz. The hardware allocation includes 4 shared physical cores with 1 thread per core and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding 2.0 GB of RAM per core. Storage is bundled with a 50 GB local NVMe SSD, and the instance includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Benchmark results position the d2-8 in the lower performance tiers. The single-core CPU performance is limited, with a stress-ng single-core score of 917.98 and a Geekbench single-core score of 907.0, both falling into the bottom 10% category. Multi-core performance is also modest, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 2930.0 and a stress-ng multi-core score of 3730.94, placing it in the bottom 25%. Memory bandwidth is constrained, with large-block read and write speeds recorded at 35.67 GB/sec and 23.03 GB/sec respectively.

Given the shared CPU allocation and lower benchmark scores, this instance is designed for entry-level, non-critical workloads where cost efficiency is prioritized over raw processing power. It is suitable for basic web serving, development environments, lightweight testing, and small-scale database operations, as demonstrated by its static web serving throughput of 2.96 GB/sec and Redis SET performance of 3.03 million operations per second.
description: The OVHcloud d2-8 is an entry-level virtual server from the Discovery family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 4 shared vCPUs powered by an Intel Haswell processor clocked at 2.0 GHz, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Designed for budget-conscious deployments, its performance profile is modest, with single-core and multi-core benchmarks generally placing in the lower percentiles. For example, its Geekbench single-core score of 907.0 and multi-core score of 2930.0 reflect its shared-resource architecture. This instance is best suited for lightweight workloads such as basic web serving, software development testing, and small-scale Redis caching, where high compute density is not required but low-cost local NVMe storage is beneficial.
og_description: OVHcloud d2-8 is a Discovery family virtual server featuring 4 shared Intel vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and a 50 GB NVMe SSD, designed as a budget-friendly option for lightweight development and basic web serving.
meta_description: OVHcloud d2-8 is a budget-friendly virtual server with 4 shared Intel vCPUs, 8.0 GB RAM, and 50 GB NVMe SSD storage for light workloads.
tagline: A budget-friendly virtual server featuring shared Intel processors and local NVMe storage for entry-level workloads and development environments.
bullet_points: 4 shared Intel Haswell vCPUs running at 2.0 GHz
8.0 GB of system memory (2.0 GB per core)
50 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
KVM hypervisor with one complimentary public IPv4 address
Suited for basic web serving, testing, and lightweight development
